---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r}
library(anndataR)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(qs2)
```
```{r}
sce_obj <- read_h5ad("C:/Users/dan_m/Desktop/POMS_local_datasets/POMS_full.h5ad", as = "SingleCellExperiment")
sce_obj
```

```{r}
qs2::qs_save(sce_obj, file="C:/Users/dan_m/Desktop/POMS_local_datasets/poms_sce_object.qs")

saveRDS(sce_obj, file="C:/Users/dan_m/Desktop/POMS_local_datasets/poms_sce_object.rds", compress=F)
```
